Metadata.title: Spotless Studio in Paso de los Libres
Metadata.description: Brand new accommodation for up to 5 guests in downtown Paso de los Libres. Garage, AC, and Wifi.

Hero.badge: Short-Term Rental - Paso de los Libres
Hero.title: Your ideal space, brand new
Hero.description: A beautiful central studio apartment equipped to give you the best rest. 1 double bed and 3 single beds.

Features.title: Everything for your comfort
Features.description: We thought of every detail for your stay for up to 5 guests.

ac.title: Air Conditioning
ac.description: Perfect climate control at all times.

kitchenette.title: Kitchenette
kitchenette.description: Includes a microwave, minibar and electric kettle.

dining.title: Dining Table
dining.description: Comfortable seating and space for up to 5 people at the same time and essential dinnerware.

Gallery.title: Take a look inside
Gallery.description: We invite you to see our facilities, everything is brand new and spotless.

Testimonials.title: What our guests say
Testimonials.description: Real experiences from those who chose us on Airbnb.
Testimonials.review1: "Excellent host, the apartment is very nice and in a very convenient location."
Testimonials.review2: "Beautiful place, everything is brand new and spotless... it has a garage and is close to the center."

Location.title: Right in the city center
Location.description: Just steps from Colón street, in the heart of Paso de los Libres.
Location.address: Downtown area, Paso de los Libres, Corrientes
